wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#030712!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#991b1b!important;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(153,27,27,.5)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:14px 24px!important;color:#f9fafb!important;font-weight:500!important;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .2s;border-left:3px solid transparent;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{border-left-color:#ef4444!important;color:#ef4444!important;background:rgba(239,68,68,.08)!important;} #wprmenu_menu_ul li{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.1)!important;} .fitness-header{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0c0a09,#1c0a0a);padding:0;overflow:hidden;} .fitness-bar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#991b1b,#ef4444,#991b1b);height:3px;} .fitness-content{padding:22px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.15);} .fitness-stats{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-bottom:12px;} .fitness-stat{text-align:center;} .fitness-stat strong{display:block;color:#ef4444;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;} .fitness-stat span{color:#6b7280;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;} .fitness-content h4{color:#f9fafb;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 3px;} .fitness-content p.sub{color:#9ca3af;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:12px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.1);display:flex;gap:10px;} .wpr_social_icons a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:32px;height:32px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);border-radius:4px;transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:#ef4444;}
content_before_menu_element:
